zh.lifeSummary: 當Erik Mattiasson Kagg於1540年出生在瑞典索德曼藍德費亞爾斯亞福特時，他的父親Mattias Nilsson Kagg38歲，母親Elin Lindormsdotter33歲。他於大約1560年與Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad在瑞典結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1592年7月29日在瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德諾拉 海倫享年52歲，埋葬在瑞典斯卡拉波格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Erik Mattiasson Kagg于1540年出生在瑞典索德曼藍德費亞爾斯亞福特时，他的父亲Mattias Nilsson Kagg38岁，母亲Elin Lindormsdotter33岁。他于大约1560年与Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad在瑞典结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1592年7月29日在瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德諾拉 海倫享年52岁，埋葬在瑞典斯卡拉波格。

nameMeanings.name: Kagg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German and South German Kägi: topographic name from Gehegi, from Middle High German gehage ‘hedge, fence’ (see Kage ).
In some cases possibly also South German (Kägy): variant of Kägi (see 1 above). This surname is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Kage
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Hermann, Wilhelm.
topographic name from a shortened form of Middle High German gehage ‘hedge, fence’, a term denoting an enclosed settlement in otherwise wild terrain.

nameMeanings.name: Erik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Later variant of   Eirik  , now in frequent use, especially in Sweden.

variants.name: Eric
meanings: Of Old Norse origin, from ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’ ( see Eirik ). It was introduced into Britain by Scandinavian settlers before the Norman Conquest. As a modern given name, it was revived in the mid 19th century and has remained in use since.

variants.name: Eirik
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Eirikr, a compound of ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.
Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Erik Mattiasson Kagg was born in 1540, in Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Sweden, his father, Mattias Nilsson Kagg, was 38 and his mother, Elin Lindormsdotter, was 33. He married Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad about 1560, in Sweden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 July 1592, in Norra Härene, Västra Götaland, Sweden, at the age of 52, and was buried in Skaraborg, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Erik Mattiasson Kagg est né en 1540, à Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Suède, son père, Mattias Nilsson Kagg, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elin Lindormsdotter, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad environ 1560, à Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1592, à Norra Härene, Västra Götaland, Suède, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Skaraborg, Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Als Erik Mattiasson Kagg 1540 in Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mattias Nilsson Kagg 38 und seine Mutter Elin Lindormsdotter 33. Er hat um 1560 in Schweden Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. Juli 1592 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Norra Härene, Västra Götaland, Schweden und wurde in Skaraborg, Schweden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Erik Mattiasson Kagg è nato il nel 1540 nel Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Svezia, il suo padre, Mattias Nilsson Kagg, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elin Lindormsdotter, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad circa 1560, nel Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 luglio 1592, nel Norra Härene, Västra Götaland, Svezia, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Skaraborg, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Erik Mattiasson Kaggが1540年にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドフジaルスクaフトで生まれた時，父Mattias Nilsson Kaggは38歳，母Elin Lindormsdotterは33歳であった。約1560年にスウェーデンでBeata Andersdotter Ekebladと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1592年7月29日にスウェーデンvaストラ グoタランドノラ haリーンで52歳で死去し，スウェーデンスカラボルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Erik Mattiasson Kagg(이)가 1540년 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 프ja스ka프트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mattias Nilsson Kagg(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elin Lindormsdotter(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1560년 스웨덴에서 Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1592년 7월 29일 스웨덴 브a스트라 그o탤란드 노라 ha렌에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스웨덴 스카라볼그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Erik Mattiasson Kagg nasceu em 1540, em Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Suécia, seu pai, Mattias Nilsson Kagg, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elin Lindormsdotter, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad aproximadamente 1560, em Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1592, em Norra Härene, Västra Götaland, Suécia, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Skaraborg, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Erik Mattiasson Kagg родился в 1540 г. в местности фджaллскaфт, сoдирманланд, Швеция, его отцу по имени Mattias Nilsson Kagg было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elin Lindormsdotter, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad около 1560 г. в местности Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 июля 1592 г. в местности норра хaрин, вaстра гoталанд, Швеция в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности скараборг, Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Erik Mattiasson Kagg nació en 1540, en Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Suecia, su papá, Mattias Nilsson Kagg, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elin Lindormsdotter, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad aproximadamente 1560, en Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de julio de 1592, en Norra Härene, Västra Götaland, Suecia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Skaraborg, Suecia.
